name: pipeline-3stage
description: Three agents run in sequence: Analyst → Builder → QA. Each consumes the previous stage's output.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Analyzes the problem statement and produces a structured spec for the Builder.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for translating a user request into an unambiguous spec: inputs, outputs, constraints, edge cases. Out of scope: writing implementation code.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Implements the spec produced by the Analyst. Does not second-guess the spec.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for producing working code that satisfies the Analyst's spec. Out of scope: redefining requirements.

replace.TODO: One-sentence purpose. When the orc: Verifies the Builder's output against the Analyst's spec. Generates tests.
replace.TODO: Two-sentence charter. What is this: Accountable for confirming spec adherence via tests and edge case probing. Out of scope: reworking implementation.

replace.TODO: Describe in 2-4 sentences.\n (1): Use when the user has a feature request that benefits from Analyst → Builder → QA sequencing. Invokes agents in order, passing each stage's output to the next. Do NOT trigger for trivial single-file edits.
